parents.subject: LU-10286 mdt: deny 2.10 clients to open mirrored files

commit.subject: LU-10581 mdd: osd_object_release()) LBUG
commit.message:
LU-10581 mdd: osd_object_release()) LBUG

If mdd_update_linkea_internal() fails it leaves
mdd_sobj with decremented reference.
mdd_lookup() can fail as it can access an object
on a remote MDT.

Perform lookup of linkEA in declare phase.

Change-Id: I001826a541da2a82e7be68df2ca4b70157281874
Cray-bug-id: MRP-4625
Signed-off-by: Andriy Skulysh <c17819@cray.com>
